2025-26 Memphis Tigers Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season

Record: 13-19 (8-10, 8th in American MBB)

Coach: Anfernee Hardaway

PS/G: 75.2 (190th of 365)

PA/G: 76.7 (259th of 365)

SRS: 3.82 (113th of 365)

SOS: 5.29 (89th of 365)

ORtg: 104.6 (289th of 365)

DRtg: 106.6 (170th of 365)

Preseason Odds: Championship +20000
